name: Ossa
description:
Ossa is a bandit goblin girl, and after you walk down a common trading route, you run into this nasty, gassy goblin, and she wants to steal well… your gold! After a mishap, she accidentally ends up on top of you, particularly her butt on… your face. Can you stop yourself from getting robbed?

(Warning, Farts and other obscene things in beginning message)

I recommend gpt-4 turbo, it has given me great results.

Discord! Please come join the Skunk Den!

(Discord username is smellestgal if you want to send friend requests!)

This was such a fun one, and I’m loving how she turned out! I hope it works well for my first of three bots for this new event! My next one will be a slime girl, or a slime girl colony, I haven’t decided yet, but be ready for some bubbly toots! Love you all! And remember, stay stinky! 💚💚💚
creator: SmellyGal
